creator: bas@area536.com
text:
I can't for the life of me coax Dovecot into dumping core. I read the page on dovecot.org that the logs refer to and attempted the drop_priv_before_exec setting, but it won't do a coredump. I also twiddled the sysctl's on the jailhost, to no avail.

I'm actually handling mail on this box so I don´t really want to disrupt it too much. Dovecot is running inside an iocage-managed jail environment. Any hint on how to achieve a core dump would be much appreciated and I'll happily provide the files.
